scripts.build: npm run icons:generate && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,magenta "vite --open false" "wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env REMIO_APP_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.electron:build:ui: npm run icons:generate && cross-env VITE_API_URL=https://www.remiolauncher.com/api tsc -b && cross-env VITE_API_URL=https://www.remiolauncher.com/api vite build --mode electron
scripts.electron:pack: npm run electron:build:ui && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.pack.config.cjs --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:ci: npm run electron:build:ui && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.ci.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.electron:build:store:helper: dotnet publish electron/store-update/Remio.StoreUpdate.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained false -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o electron/store-update/bin
scripts.cap:build: npm run icons:generate && cross-env VITE_API_URL=https://www.remiolauncher.com/api tsc -b && cross-env VITE_API_URL=https://www.remiolauncher.com/api vite build --mode capacitor
scripts.cap:sync: npm run cap:build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run ios
